_publications._publicationTitle: Interpreting mammalian target of rapamycin and cell growth inhibition in a genetically engineered mouse model of Nf1-deficient astrocytes.

_contextSnippet: 4EBP1 phosphorylation was unchanged at the 2mg/kg/day dose, whereas significant reductions were observed both at 5 and 20mg/kg/day rapamycin doses
resourceName: Nf1 GFAP CKO mice (Nf1 flox/flox; GFAP-Cre)
details: 4EBP1 phosphorylation was unchanged at 2mg/kg/day dose, with significant reductions at 5 and 20mg/kg/day rapamycin doses
